name: Stewed Celery in Cream
recipeIngredient: 3 - 4 gratings of fresh nutmeg, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Simmer the celery in stock until just tender, about 12-15 minutes. Remove from heat, drain and reserve stock (about 2/3 cup).
2. In a heavy saucepan, melt butter and stir in flour, using a whisk to blend well.
3. Cook until it bubbles.
4. Combine cream and reserved stock, pour into the butter and flour mixture.
5. Simmer until thickened, about 3 minutes.
6. Add nutmeg. Put celery back into the sauce and warm through before serving.
